---
title: "data_viz"
author: "daniel dominguez"
date: "2026-02-02"
output: html_document
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(arrow)
library(lubridate)

pred_con <- read_parquet(pred_con_path) %>%
  mutate(
    date  = as.Date(date),          # converts if it's already Date/POSIXct/character
    comid = as.integer(comid)
  )

target_date <- as.Date("2012-01-01")

pred_con_filter <- pred_con %>%
  filter(date == target_date)


```

```{r}
obs_by_comid <- pred_con %>%
  count(comid, name = "n_obs") %>%
  arrange(desc(n_obs))

obs_by_comid

```
